title: Wiped's Skyblock Overlay
description: A nice and clean texture pack for Hypixel Skyblock
body:
This is a decently clean pack I made for Hypixel Skyblock.
I don't take credit for all the textures, as a lot of them are recolors of other packs.

Most items are taken from either vanilla Minecraft or Defrosted.
The model files, most .properties files and a few textures are taken from FurfSky.
All recolors and retextures are done by me.

- Defrosted: https://youtu.be/j_KcTp-yrD8?si=sIvH-_zvP_yBd_2v
- FurfSky: https://furfsky.net/
